goals: Store information about a horse's training progress and behavioral patterns
Search for previously stored information about a specific horse's training preferences
Review all stored memories to see what has been remembered about horses
Remove outdated or incorrect memories about a horse

memories.content: Thunder is a 3-year-old colt being broke to ride
Thunder is a 3-year-old colt being broke to ride
He responds well to desensitization exercises with flags
Thunder is a 3-year-old colt being broke to ride
He responds well to desensitization exercises with flags
Prefers working in the morning when it's cooler

user_agent_config.personality: Practical and hands-on. Prefers learning by doing and values keeping track of progress with each horse over time.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Knows nothing about mem0, vector stores, or AI memory systems. Understands horse training deeply but has no technical background.

end_condition: The user has successfully stored training notes, searched for past information, reviewed all stored memories, and removed any outdated entries about a horse.
